overview.description: The NEOS Russell 2000 High Income ETF (IWMI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-fund that seeks to generate income by investing in constituents of the Russell 2000 Index while also employing a call option strategy. IWMI was launched on Jun 25, 2024 and is issued by Neos.

data.title: Small-Cap Leaderships Highlights This ETF's Utility, Value
data.text: Through the first four months of 2026, the Russell 2000 Index, one of the most widely observed small-cap equity gauges, jumped 13.1%, thoroughly outpacing the 5.7% returned by the S&P 500.
